meaning: adj.[地](由古生代、中生代和新生代构成的地质年代)显生宙的
examples: After the Sinian Great Ice Age, the Phanerozoic started.
The young Nd model ages suggest a significant crustal growth in the period of Neoproterozoic-Phanerozoic.
The Phanerozoic is divided into three eras -starting with the earliest, these are the Paleozoic, Mesozoic, and Cenozoic.
